content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.96%, VIX +8.4% to 18.26, broad weakness with Realty/Auto/Energy down hard. IT, Pharma, FMCG showing relative strength acting as defensive rotation. CPI print tomorrow is a near-term swing factor; mixed tape favors managing existing book over adding fresh risk. MCX position shows a catastrophic -62% P&L on data — appears to be a data/corporate-action anomaly (CMP 3193 vs avg 8400) since current price ₹3201 matches today's high; SL at 8150 is far above CMP and meaningless — needs urgent review.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge intact. CMP 123.77 vs SL 121.00 — 2.2% buffer, within noise tolerance. Gold consolidating after record-rally, geopolitical risk premium intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 880.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.3% gain, BULLISH research (+0.07 modifier), Q4 beat, MOFSL TP 950. SL already at 832 (above entry 820, breakeven+1.4%) — keeping intact, gap to CMP 847 is 1.8% (>1% floor). Raising target to 880 to give room for momentum continuation. No SL micro-adjust."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.69,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.1% gain, BULLISH research (+0.10), Q4 PAT +145% QoQ, Encora deal closed, brokerage TPs up to 2020. Current SL 1357.69 already locked-in profit; CMP 1385.80, gap ~2% — within 1% floor with breathing room. No SL change (would be micro-adjust). Raising target to 1500 to capture momentum to next resistance. R:R remains favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat P&L. BULLISH research (+0.10), Q4 PAT +47% FY, Odisha capex doubled. SL 2740 vs CMP 2784 gives 1.6% buffer. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, near entry. BULLISH research (+0.05), high volume today (3.3x) signals institutional bid. SL 8950 vs CMP 9062 — 1.2% buffer. Hold for breakout above 9136 intraday high."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, but buyback at Rs 12,000 (record May 29) creates technical floor. Rs 150 dividend, BULLISH research (+0.08 to +0.10). SL 10440 vs CMP 10610 gives 1.6% buffer — adequate for buyback-anchored name. Hold to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, BULLISH research (+0.07), FY27 guidance upgrade to low-double-digit, dividend Rs 5.50. SL 468 vs CMP 476.50 — 1.8% buffer. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1340.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.7% gain, BULLISH research (+0.12 — strongest in the book). SL 1255 already at entry+2.4% (locked profit). Gap to CMP 1272 is 1.4% (>1% floor) — fine. Raising target to 1340 given ATH momentum, FY26 PAT +148%, Rs 3000Cr capex. No SL change to avoid micro-adjust."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, fresh entry hit today's high near 1260. Q4 beat (+21.6% PAT), BULLISH research (+0.05), Rs 10 dividend. SL 1198 is wider (4% from entry) but within risk budget for a 5% position. Hold to let breakout develop. Also CANCEL pending duplicate BUY at 1240 (see separate decision)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, near entry. BULLISH (+0.08), 3.2x volume on weak capital-goods day = strong relative strength. SL 850 vs CMP 863 — 1.5% buffer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2%, near entry. HSBC upgrade to Buy TP 9000, Q4 results May 20 (within hold window). BULLISH (+0.08). SL 7950 vs CMP 8064 — 1.4% buffer. Note: Q4 board meet May 20 = binary event ~7 sessions out, within max_hold but watch closely as it approaches."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 6,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.9,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Data shows -62% P&L (entry 8400, CMP 3193) — but actual MCX CMP per market data is ₹3201 today, day range 3042-3215. This is a CORPORATE ACTION anomaly (likely bonus/split adjustment) where entry price was not adjusted. SL 8150 is meaningless (above CMP). The position is effectively unmanaged with no functional SL. EXIT at market to remove the broken position. Will re-evaluate fresh entry if appropriate — MCX research is BULLISH (+0.05), Q4 PAT +291%, but earnings call TODAY 4PM is binary event so re-entry deferred. Reasoning: stale-state cleanup + Rule 11 binary-event-today prevents immediate re-entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, near entry. BULLISH (+0.07), Organon deal closing 2027, Q4 results ~May 20-21. Nifty Pharma at 52w high, INR weakness tailwind. SL 1830 vs CMP 1873 — 2.3% buffer. Hold; reassess as Q4 approaches (binary event ~7 sessions)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY at LIMIT 1240 placed 359m ago is now stale — CMP 1257.50, well above. Cannot CANCEL via schema; noting here that this order will not fill and should be ignored. Position already established in book per holdings line. Order hygiene flag."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, normal noise."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 832, "reasoning": "SL already locked above entry, target raised."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1357.69, "reasoning": "SL locked, target raised to 1500."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact, SL has adequate room."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Volume surge, hold for breakout."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback anchor at Rs 12000 record May 29."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact, SL absorbs noise."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1255, "reasoning": "SL at entry+2.4%, target raised to 1340."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, let setup develop."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strong relative strength on volume."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 20 — will reassess closer to event."},
    {"symbol": "MCX", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Stale state — position effectively unmanaged, EXIT at market."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Pharma sector strength, Q4 ~May 20."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates passed on with explicit reasons: (a) TATACONSUM, COFORGE, MARICO, SRF, POLYCAB, LAURUSLABS, BAJAJ-AUTO, CGPOWER, DABUR, APOLLOHOSP, SUNPHARMA — already held, no need to re-add. (b) MCX (+0.05 BULLISH) — Q4 earnings call TODAY 4PM IST, Rule 11 binary-event-within-3-sessions blocks new entry; defer to post-print. (c) THERMAX (+0.08 BULLISH) — stock has faded 5% from open high (4880→4587), 15-min candles only run to 10:30, looks like data feed gap; momentum-extended at ATH, R:R unattractive at these levels. (d) NIFTYBEES (NEUTRAL +0.02) — Nifty -1% day, CPI tomorrow is binary macro event (Rule 11 + active-trader caution), no edge. (e) BIOCON, TORNTPHARM, INFY, HCLTECH, PERSISTENT — not in deep-dive batch this cycle, will revisit. Deployment 54%, cash 46% — under soft 80%, but VIX +8.4% with CPI tomorrow justifies measured stance. Will re-engage post-CPI tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across FMCG (MARICO, DABUR, TATACONSUM), IT (COFORGE), Pharma (SUNPHARMA, LAURUSLABS), Healthcare (APOLLOHOSP), Capital Goods (POLYCAB, CGPOWER), Chemicals (SRF), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), Gold ETF (GOLDBEES). Unrealized -2.5% on the day driven primarily by the MCX data anomaly (-₹31,248). Cleaning that up restores a more representative picture. VIX spike + CPI tomorrow argues against new admits today; tomorrow's print is the catalyst to reassess fresh entries. Daily loss limit has ₹49K remaining headroom — comfortable. Cash 46% — explicit reason for non-deployment: (i) MCX stale-state cleanup releases ~₹19K trapped capital, (ii) CPI binary tomorrow, (iii) 11 quality holdings already covering core themes."
}
